_comment: Instagram Reels algorithm signals and Meta Graph API v25.0 reference. Source: Adam Mosseri official statements January 2025, Meta Graph API changelog, adversarially verified against 5+ independent sources. Updated when meta-graph-api-changelog source fires a change event. Do not invent endpoints — null and flag instead.

algorithm_signals._source: Adam Mosseri (Instagram head) official statements January 2025 — verified

signals.notes: A 15-second Reel watched 3 times outranks a 60-second Reel watched once. The 3-second mark is a critical gate — skip_rate metric added December 2025 tracks viewers who leave within 3 seconds.
signals.lever: hook quality in first 3 seconds; audio-on assumption design

signals.weight: primary — UNIQUE TO REELS (3 to 5x weight of likes)
signals.notes: Ratio of DM shares to total reach. 694,000 Reels shared per DM per minute (Meta 2025). This is Reels' differentiating primary signal vs. TikTok. Content designed to be sent to a specific person (before-and-after reveals, show-this-to-your-partner moments) outperforms content designed for general broadcasting.
signals.lever: format content as 'send this to someone' moments

signals.notes: Ratio to total views, not raw count. Higher weight for connected (follower) reach than non-follower reach.
signals.lever: content that provokes emotional response from existing audience

signals.notes: 50 saves + 20 shares outperforms 200 likes + 0 shares for distribution. Saves signal reference value.
signals.lever: tutorial content, step-by-step guides, before-and-after reference images

signals.notes: DMs, comment replies, and Story reactions between two accounts. Signals genuine relationship. Newer signal — weight TBD vs. saves.
signals.lever: reply to comments and DMs promptly; prompt specific conversational responses

signals.notes: Accounts with 10+ reposts in a 30-day period are EXCLUDED from Recommendations entirely (December 31, 2025 Mosseri memo). Original content gets 40 to 60% more distribution than re-shared content. Never repost TikTok-watermarked content.
signals.lever: post original content only; if repurposing from TikTok, use the source file without watermark

signals.notes: Last 9 to 12 posts determine account topic categorization. Off-topic posts reduce distribution to the home decor interest cluster.
signals.lever: maintain pillar consistency across the most recent 9 to 12 posts

signals.notes: Classified as a ranking signal for recommendation matching. Original audio preferred for recommendation; trending audio supports discoverability via audio page.
signals.lever: use original voiceover as primary audio; trending audio as secondary if used

signals.notes: Keyword-rich captions improve topic classification for recommendation matching.
signals.lever: first 125 characters of caption are most visible in feed; front-load niche keywords

hashtag_mechanics_2025_2026.hashtag_follow_removed: December 2024 — hashtags are no longer followable topics
hashtag_mechanics_2025_2026.function: Classification signals for Meta's recommendation system; no longer traffic sources
hashtag_mechanics_2025_2026.recommendation: 3 to 5 highly specific niche hashtags outperform 10+ generic hashtags
hashtag_mechanics_2025_2026.keywords_vs_hashtags: Keywords in captions now drive discovery more strongly than hashtags

trial_reels.behavior: Shows Reel to non-followers only before committing to full audience distribution

insights_endpoints.account_insights: GET /{ig-user-id}/insights — interactions, likes, comments, saves, shares, views, reach, follows, unfollows

competitor_monitoring.note: The ONLY official endpoint for competitor monitoring without requiring the competitor's OAuth.

webhooks.certificate_change: March 31, 2026 — Meta switched to Meta-owned CA. Webhook trust stores must be updated to include the new certificate.

critical_deprecations.impact: Any integration using Basic Display API stopped working. Must migrate to Instagram Graph API via Facebook App.
New scope names: instagram_business_basic, instagram_business_content_publish, instagram_business_manage_messages, instagram_business_manage_comments
Any v20.0 API calls will fail after this date

critical_deprecations.deprecation: v22.0 metrics: impressions, plays, multiple video metrics

video_pin_flow.step_1: POST /v5/media — register video upload, receive upload_url
video_pin_flow.step_2: PUT {upload_url} — upload file to AWS S3 directly
video_pin_flow.step_3: POST /v5/pins — create pin with media_id from step 1

algorithm_signals_2025_2026.primary: saves (repins) — compound over months to years
algorithm_signals_2025_2026.classification: keyword relevance in title, description, board name; entity recognition (added 2026)
algorithm_signals_2025_2026.longevity: Pins can rank and drive traffic for months to years — unlike TikTok/Instagram which decay in days
algorithm_signals_2025_2026.real_time_engagement_2026: Interaction on one pin immediately surfaces similar content from that account in the same session
